calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Reda Naguib in Propria Persona.
Ali Abdella also present.

The Court noted that Mr. Salama was not present. The matter was passed and called at the end of the calendar. Mr. Naguib stated that Karima was ill. The Court noted that Karima who is the objector and her Counsel Joseph Salama are not present. The Petition for Spousal Property is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Continued To Jan-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2017 Continued To Dec-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Salama for Mohab Mohamed.
Karima Naguib in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it needs a supplement responding to the Probate Examiner's notes. Mr. Salama stated that he did not receive the notes. The Court noted that notes were faxes on September 15th and that there have been three continuances for lack of response. Mr. Salama stated that they are considering whether they need to move forward at all with this and they are looking into other legal action. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to December 12, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-02-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Continued To Aug-02-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Salama for and with Mohab Mohamed (Petitioner).
Karima Naguib in Propria Persona.
Reda Naguib in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Mr. Salama that it is unclear as to what he is asking to be transferred. Ms. Naguib stated that she was told by a Woman from the licensing agency that the day care had to close because the license terminates upon Mona's death and that is not transferrable. Ms. Naguib also stated that the lease for the apartment is now in the name of Reda and herself and is used for living purposes and for the purpose of running the day care. Mr. Salama stated that Reda's name was put on the lease because he had no where to live, that Reda and Karima have taken over everything (the business, personal property, mail), that they denied his Client and the Decedent's Daughter access to everything, and that he is asking for the good will of the business, furniture and mail. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to August 2, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Salama to amend the petition to be specific as to what he is asking to be transferred.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Continued To Jul-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karima Naguib (Sister of Decedent) in Propria Persona.
Reda Naguib (Brother of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Ms. Naguib stated that they object to the petition. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to July 5, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of written objections/oppositions which are to be filed by June 28, 2017. The Court suggests the parties hire an Attorney.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
